name: Troy Alstead
background: Troy Alstead has served as a member of our Board since March 2021. Mr. Alstead previously served as Chief Operating Officer of Starbucks Corporation.

company_affiliations.name: Starbucks Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chief Operating Officer (and various senior executive roles including CFO)
